description: Product Description BE READY FOR ANY WEATHER If there's one thing everyone should have, it's good quality outdoor gear. But often times, people forget the basics. Something to prepare for weather emergencies. We've all been there... You confidently go out for the hiking, theme park or festival in your summer clothes. Then... dark clouds come in... it gets a bit windy... and then the rain starts pouring from the sky. You tell yourself: why did I not think of this? But, taking a bulk coat is madness in the summer. Then, taking rain poncho is a must have! Prodive Comprehensive Protection for your family Made out of premium quality PE material, which is more soft, extra thick and water-resist Breathable: Keep you cool during those hot days eliminating the sauna effect Tear-resistant: More than once use Each poncho comes with individual pack, convenient to carry Extra Large Size Our Family Pack custom ponchos are designed of attached hood and elastic cuff to fit both adult and younth. EXTRA Wide (33.4 inch width) to fit most widest people possible. Enjoy a rainy trip with friends and family. Feature The Poncho is 109 x 85 cm Sleeve Length: 61 cm Thickness: 0.03 mm Total length with hood: 140 cm It fits large persons even when wearing a backpack Be Prepared For Your Next Adventure! Whether you are going to a concert, taking your kids to Disneyland, hiking, shopping, or going to a Sports Events, the rain poncho is an item you should always have with you. This simple yet versatile item has become a useful and necessary product that allows people to enjoy their outdoor activities they love in all weather conditions.
